title: uniface.InvalidContextObjectException
text: uniface.InvalidContextObjectException Exception thrown if the FieldErrorContext object on which the function is called is no longer valid. Description There could be a number of reasons why this exception is thrown. For example, the occurrence that caused the error has been deleted on the client or the server. Related Links uniface.FieldErrorContext The uniface.FieldErrorContext object is the this object for the showError and clearError web triggers. It provides access to information about the field in error, the validation error, and the DOM node that represent the field in the layout. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
